concerns.text: T030 validates quickstart.md for reproducibility but Constitution Principle I requires results be reproducible by re-running code/ against data/ on a fresh GitHub Actions runner. Task does not implement the constitutional reproducibility requirement.

T031 updates state YAML with artifact hashes but Constitution Principle V requires every artifact carries a content hash. Task does not explicitly generate content hashes, only updates the state file.
Constitution Principle III requires PII scan enforcement but no task exists to run PII scanning in the workflow. Missing implementation task for constitutional requirement.

Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent execution for citations but no task or code component implements this validation. Missing implementation task for constitutional requirement.
Plan.md lists quickstart.md and data-model.md as Phase 1 outputs but no tasks exist to create these documents. Missing implementation tasks for plan-specified deliverables.
